task_id: 补齐四个正向样例视觉证据链并接入FinalArchive

python3 - <<'PY'
import importlib.util, json
from pathlib import Path
worktree = Path('/Users/linsuchang/Desktop/work/my-agent-teams/.runtime/worktrees/chiralium/FinalArchive-0c4e0ffc')
archive_root = Path('/Users/linsuchang/Desktop/work/chiralium/artifacts/pdf2word/final-archive/profiles/hybrid_experimental')
for name, path in [('workspace_mod', worktree / 'backend/app/services/pdf_to_word/workspace.py'), ('fidelity_mod', worktree / 'backend/app/services/pdf_to_word/fidelity_veto.py')]:
    spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location(name, path)
    module = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec)
    spec.loader.exec_module(module)
    globals()[name] = module
required = set(workspace_mod.CANONICAL_VISUAL_EVIDENCE_FILENAMES)
for sample_name in ['五下科学','数学八年级','数学试卷','英语八年级']:
    sample_dir = archive_root / sample_name
    collected = workspace_mod.collect_canonical_visual_evidence(sample_dir)
    assert collected['complete']
    manifest = json.loads((sample_dir/'source_manifest.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    assert required.issubset(set(manifest.get('generated_files') or []))
    payload = json.loads((sample_dir/'fidelity_veto.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    workspace_mod.collect_canonical_visual_evidence(sample_dir)
    fidelity_mod.summarize_fidelity_veto_payload(payload, sample_name=sample_name)
print('OK')
PY

remaining_gaps: 当前环境仍缺少 soffice/libreoffice，因此四个 render_pair.json 都是 docx_render_missing，visual_similarity.json 也都停留在 artifact_not_ready。
五下科学仍有 fallback 页 1 的 2 个 P0 fidelity veto；英语八年级仍有 fallback 页 3/11 的 4 个 P0 fidelity veto。
数学八年级与数学试卷虽无 P0 fidelity veto，但仍需真实 render pair、打分后的 visual similarity 与人工复核后，才能恢复 human visual 95 口径。
